pairs.english: An East Karhidish story,
pairs.hanzi: 一个东卡尔希迪什的故事，
pairs.target: yígè dōng kǎěr xī dí shén de gùshì ,
yóu tuō bódé · qiáo ěr hā wǎ zài gēlín hè líng bìlú jiǎngshù ,
pairs.english: as told in Gorinhering Hearth by Tobord Chorhawa,
pairs.hanzi: 由托博德·乔尔哈瓦在戈林赫灵壁炉讲述，

alignment.target: tuō bódé · qiáo ěr hā wǎ

pairs.target: bìng yóu G. jìlù ,
pairs.english: and recorded by G.
pairs.hanzi: 并由G.记录，

pairs.target: A., 93/1492. bèi luósīdì · léi mǔ · yīěr · yī pèi xūnjué láidào sāng gélín yàosài ,
pairs.english: A., 93/1492. Lord Berosty rem ir Ipe came to Thangering Fastness
pairs.hanzi: A.，93/1492。贝罗斯蒂·雷姆·伊尔·伊佩勋爵来到桑格林要塞，

alignment.target: bèi luósīdì · léi mǔ · yīěr · yī pèi
alignment.hanzi: 贝罗斯蒂·雷姆·伊尔·伊佩

pairs.target: bìng xiànshàng sìshíkē lǜzhùshí hé bànnián de guǒyuán shōuchéng ,
pairs.english: and offered forty beryls and half the year's yield
pairs.hanzi: 并献上四十颗绿柱石和半年的果园收成，

pairs.target: zuòwéi zhānbǔ de dàijià ,
pairs.english: from his orchards as the price of a Foretelling,
pairs.hanzi: 作为占卜的代价，

pairs.target: zhège jiàgé bèi jiēshòu le .
pairs.english: and the price was acceptable.
pairs.hanzi: 这个价格被接受了。

pairs.target: tā xiàng biānzhī zhě àodé lún tíchū le zìjǐ de wèntí ,
pairs.english: He set his question to the Weaver Odren,
pairs.hanzi: 他向编织者奥德伦提出了自己的问题，

pairs.target: wèntí shì ,
pairs.english: and the question was,
pairs.hanzi: 问题是，

pairs.target: wǒhuì zài nǎyìtiān sǐqù ?
pairs.english: On what day shall I die?
pairs.hanzi: 我会在哪一天死去？

pairs.target: yùyánzhě men jùjí zài yìqǐ , zǒurù hēiàn .
pairs.english: The Foretellers gathered and went together into the darkness.
pairs.hanzi: 预言者们聚集在一起，走入黑暗。

pairs.target: zài hēiàn jiéshù shí , àodé lún shuōchū le dáàn :
pairs.english: At the end of darkness Odren spoke the answer:
pairs.hanzi: 在黑暗结束时，奥德伦说出了答案：

pairs.target: nǐ huì zài àodé sītèléi sī měiyuè dìshíjiǔ tiān sǐqù
pairs.english: You will die on Odstreth (the 19th day of
pairs.hanzi: 你会在奥德斯特雷斯（每月第十九天）死去

pairs.target: rènhé yígèyuè . " nǎ yígèyuè ?
pairs.english: any month)."In what month?
pairs.hanzi: 任何一个月）。“哪一个月？

pairs.target: duōshào nián hòu ? " bèi luósīdì hǎndào ,
pairs.english: In how many years?"cried Berosty,
pairs.hanzi: 多少年后？”贝罗斯蒂喊道，

pairs.target: dàn qìyuē yǐjīng pòliè ,
pairs.english: but the bond was broken,
pairs.hanzi: 但契约已经破裂，

pairs.target: méiyǒu dáàn .
pairs.english: andthere was no answer.
pairs.hanzi: 没有答案。

pairs.target: tā chōng jìn quānzi , zhuāzhù le biānzhī zhě
pairs.english: He ran into the circle and took the Weaver
pairs.hanzi: 他冲进圈子，抓住了编织者

pairs.target: àodé lún de hóulóng , qiāzhù tā , dàshēng hǎndào
pairs.english: Odren by the throat choking him and shouted that
pairs.hanzi: 奥德伦的喉咙，掐住他，大声喊道

pairs.target: rúguǒ débúdào gèng duō de dáàn , tā jiùyào qiāduàn
pairs.english: if he got no further answer he would break
pairs.hanzi: 如果得不到更多的答案，他就要掐断

pairs.target: biānzhī zhě de bózi .
pairs.english: the Weaver's neck.
pairs.hanzi: 编织者的脖子。

pairs.target: qítārén bǎ tā lākāi bìng ànzhù tā ,
pairs.english: Others pulled him off and held him,
pairs.hanzi: 其他人把他拉开并按住他，

pairs.target: jǐnguǎn tā shì gè qiángzhuàng de rén .
pairs.english: though he was a strong man.
pairs.hanzi: 尽管他是个强壮的人。

pairs.target: tā zhèngtuō tāmen de shǒu , dàshēng hǎndào ,
pairs.english: He strained against their hands and cried out,
pairs.hanzi: 他挣脱他们的手，大声喊道，

pairs.target: " gàosù wǒ dáàn ! " àodé lún shuō ,
pairs.english: "Give me the answer!"Odren said,
pairs.hanzi: “告诉我答案！”奥德伦说，

pairs.target: " dáàn yǐjīng gěichū ,
pairs.english: "It is given,
pairs.hanzi: “答案已经给出，

pairs.target: dàijià yě yǐ fùqīng .
pairs.english: and the price paid.
pairs.hanzi: 代价也已付清。

pairs.target: zǒu ba . " fènnù de bèi luósīdì · léi mǔ · yīěr · yī pèi biàn huídào le chá lǔ sè ,
pairs.english: Go."Raging then Berosty rem ir Ipe returned to Charuthe,
pairs.hanzi: 走吧。”愤怒的贝罗斯蒂·雷姆·伊尔·伊佩便回到了查鲁瑟，

alignment.target: bèi luósīdì · léi mǔ · yīěr · yī pèi
alignment.hanzi: 贝罗斯蒂·雷姆·伊尔·伊佩

pairs.target: tā jiāzú de dìsān lǐngdì ,
pairs.english: the third Domain of his family,
pairs.hanzi: 他家族的第三领地，

pairs.target: wèiyú ào sīnuò lǐnà běibù de yígè pínjí zhī dì ,
pairs.english: a poor place in northern Osnoriner,
pairs.hanzi: 位于奥斯诺里纳北部的一个贫瘠之地，

pairs.target: wèile còuqí zhānbǔ de dàijià , tā ràng zhèlǐ biànde gèngjiā pínqióng ,
pairs.english: which he had made poorer in getting together the
pairs.hanzi: 为了凑齐占卜的代价，他让这里变得更加贫穷，

pairs.target: zhānbǔ de dàijià .
pairs.english: price of a Foretelling.
pairs.hanzi: 占卜的代价。

pairs.target: tā bǎ zìjǐ guān zài bǎolěi lǐ ,
pairs.english: He shut himself up in the strong-place,
pairs.hanzi: 他把自己关在堡垒里，

pairs.target: zài bìlú tǎ zuìgāo de fángjiān lǐ ,
pairs.english: in the highest rooms of the Hearth-Tower,
pairs.hanzi: 在壁炉塔最高的房间里，

pairs.target: wúlùnshì péngyǒu háishì dírén , tā dōu bùkěn chūlái ,
pairs.english: and would not come out for friend or foe,
pairs.hanzi: 无论是朋友还是敌人，他都不肯出来，

pairs.target: wúlùnshì bōzhǒng háishì shōuhuò ,
pairs.english: for seedtime or harvest,
pairs.hanzi: 无论是播种还是收获，

pairs.target: wúlùnshì kè mò háishì tūxí ,
pairs.english: for kemmer or foray,
pairs.hanzi: 无论是克默还是突袭，

pairs.target: zhěnggè yuè , jiēzhe yòu yígèyuè , zài yígèyuè ,
pairs.english: all that month and the next and the next,
pairs.hanzi: 整个月，接着又一个月，再一个月，

pairs.target: liùgèyuè guòqù le , shígèyuè yě guòqù le ,
pairs.english: and six months went by and ten months went
pairs.hanzi: 六个月过去了，十个月也过去了，

pairs.target: tā yīrán xiàng qiúfàn yíyàng shǒu zài
pairs.english: by, and he still kept like a prisoner to his
pairs.hanzi: 他依然像囚犯一样守在

pairs.target: fángjiān lǐ děngdài . zài áng nèi sè hādé hé àodé sītèléi sī měiyuè dìshíbā hé dìshíjiǔ tiān
pairs.english: room, waiting. On Onnetherhad and Odstreth (the 18th and 19th days
pairs.hanzi: 房间里等待。在昂内瑟哈德和奥德斯特雷斯（每月第十八和第十九天）

pairs.target: tā shénme shíwù dōu bùchī ,
pairs.english: of the month) he would not eat any food,
pairs.hanzi: 他什么食物都不吃，

pairs.target: yě bù hēshuǐ ,
pairs.english: nor would he drink,
pairs.hanzi: 也不喝水，

pairs.target: yě bú shuìjiào .
pairs.english: nor would he sleep.
pairs.hanzi: 也不睡觉。

pairs.target: tā yīn ài yǔ shìyán jiéwèi kè mò bànlǚ de shì hè bó ěr ,
pairs.english: His kemmering by love and vow was Herbor of
pairs.hanzi: 他因爱与誓言结为克默伴侣的是赫博尔，

pairs.target: gài jiānà jiāzú de rén .
pairs.english: the Geganner clan.
pairs.hanzi: 盖加纳家族的人。

pairs.target: zhège hè bó ěr zài gé lúndé yuè láidào
pairs.english: This Herbor came in the month of Grende to
pairs.hanzi: 这个赫博尔在格伦德月来到

pairs.target: sāng gélín yàosài , duì zhīgōng shuōdào ,
pairs.english: Thangering Fastness and said to the Weaver,
pairs.hanzi: 桑格林要塞，对织工说道，

pairs.target: " wǒ lái qiú yícì yùyán . "" nǐ ná shénme lái zhīfù ? " àodé lún wèndào ,
pairs.english: "I seek a Foretelling.""What have you to pay?"Odren asked,
pairs.hanzi: “我来求一次预言。”“你拿什么来支付？”奥德伦问道，

pairs.target: yīnwèi tā kàndào nà rén yīzhuó hánsuān ,
pairs.english: for he saw that the man was poorly dressed
pairs.hanzi: 因为他看到那人衣着寒酸，

pairs.target: xiézǐ yě hěn pòjiù ,
pairs.english: and badly shod,
pairs.hanzi: 鞋子也很破旧，

pairs.target: tā de xuěqiāo yě hěn chénjiù ,
pairs.english: and his sledge was old,
pairs.hanzi: 他的雪橇也很陈旧，

pairs.target: tā shēnshàng de yíqiè dōu xūyào xiūbǔ . " wǒ yuànyì xiànchū wǒ de
pairs.english: and everything about him wanted mending."I will give my
pairs.hanzi: 他身上的一切都需要修补。“我愿意献出我的

pairs.target: shēngmìng , " hè bó ěr shuōdào . " nǐ méiyǒu biéde le ma ,
pairs.english: life, "said Herbor."Have you nothing else,
pairs.hanzi: 生命，”赫博尔说道。“你没有别的了吗，

pairs.target: dàrén ? " àodé lún wèn tā ,
pairs.english: my lord?"Odren asked him,
pairs.hanzi: 大人？”奥德伦问他，

pairs.target: cǐkè tā yǐ duìdài guìzú de kǒuwěn shuō ,
pairs.english: speaking now as to a great nobleman,
pairs.hanzi: 此刻他以对待贵族的口吻说，

pairs.target: " zhēnde méiyǒu biéde kěyǐ gěi le ma ? "" wǒ zhēnde méiyǒu biéde le ,
pairs.english: "nothing else to give?""I have nothing else,
pairs.hanzi: “真的没有别的可以给了吗？”“我真的没有别的了，

pairs.target: " hè bó ěr shuō . " dàn wǒ bù zhīdào wǒ de shēngmìng
pairs.english: "said Herbor."But I do not know if my life
pairs.hanzi: ”赫博尔说。“但我不知道我的生命

pairs.target: zài zhèlǐ duì nǐmen láishuō shìfǒu yǒu jiàzhí . "" méiyǒu ,
pairs.english: is of any value to you here.""No,
pairs.hanzi: 在这里对你们来说是否有价值。”“没有，

pairs.target: " àodé lún shuō , " duì wǒmen láishuō méiyǒu jiàzhí . " yúshì hè bó ěr guìdǎo
pairs.english: "said Odren, "it is of no value to us."Then Herbor fell
pairs.hanzi: ”奥德伦说，“对我们来说没有价值。”于是赫博尔跪倒

alignment.english: it is of no value to us

pairs.target: zài dì ,
pairs.english: on his knees,
pairs.hanzi: 在地，

pairs.target: bèi xiūkuì yǔ ài jīdǎo ,
pairs.english: struck down by shame and love,
pairs.hanzi: 被羞愧与爱击倒，

pairs.target: xiàng àodé lún kūsù dào ,
pairs.english: and cried to Odren,
pairs.hanzi: 向奥德伦哭诉道，

pairs.target: " wǒ qiú nǐ huídá wǒ de wèntí .
pairs.english: "I beg you to answer my question.
pairs.hanzi: “我求你回答我的问题。

pairs.target: zhè búshì wèi wǒ zìjǐ ! "" nà shì wèi shuí ,
pairs.english: It is not for myself!""For whom,
pairs.hanzi: 这不是为我自己！”“那是为谁，

pairs.target: nàme ? " zhīgōng wèndào . " shì wèi wǒ de zhǔrén hé kè mò bànlǚ āshén · bèi luósī tí ,
pairs.english: then? asked the Weaver."For my lord and kemmering Ashe Berosty,
pairs.hanzi: 那么？”织工问道。“是为我的主人和克默伴侣阿什·贝罗斯提，

pairs.target: " nà rén shuōdào ,
pairs.english: "said the man,
pairs.hanzi: ”那人说道，

pairs.target: tā kū le . " tā zài wú ài , wú huānlè ,
pairs.english: and he wept."He has no love nor joy nor
pairs.hanzi: 他哭了。“他再无爱、无欢乐，

pairs.target: zìcóng tā láidào zhèlǐ dédào nàge dáàn hòu , yě shīqù le zhǔrén de zūnyán ,
pairs.english: lordship since he came here and got that answer
pairs.hanzi: 自从他来到这里得到那个答案后，也失去了主人的尊严，

pairs.target: nàge dáàn gēnběn búshì dáàn .
pairs.english: which was no answer.
pairs.hanzi: 那个答案根本不是答案。

pairs.target: tā huì yīncǐ ér sǐ . "" tā quèshí huì :
pairs.english: He will die of it.""That he will:
pairs.hanzi: 他会因此而死。”“他确实会：

pairs.target: rén chúle sǐ yú zìjǐ de sǐwáng , hái néng sǐ yú shénme ? "
pairs.english: what does a man die of but his death?"said
pairs.hanzi: 人除了死于自己的死亡，还能死于什么？”

pairs.target: zhīgōng àodé lún shuōdào .
pairs.english: the Weaver Odren.
pairs.hanzi: 织工奥德伦说道。

pairs.target: dàn hè bó ěr de qínggǎn dǎdòng le tā ,
pairs.english: But Herbor's passion moved him,
pairs.hanzi: 但赫博尔的情感打动了他，

pairs.target: zuìzhōng tā shuōdào ,
pairs.english: and at length he said,
pairs.hanzi: 最终他说道，

pairs.target: " wǒhuì qù xúnzhǎo nǐ suǒ wèn wèntí de dáàn ,
pairs.english: "I will seek the answer of thequestion you ask,
pairs.hanzi: “我会去寻找你所问问题的答案，

pairs.target: hè bó ěr , wǒ búhuì yào rènhé bàochóu .
pairs.english: Herbor, and I will ask no price.
pairs.hanzi: 赫博尔，我不会要任何报酬。

pairs.target: dàn nǐ yào jìzhù ,
pairs.english: But bethink you,
pairs.hanzi: 但你要记住，

pairs.target: zǒngshì yǒu dàijià de .
pairs.english: there is always a price.
pairs.hanzi: 总是有代价的。

pairs.target: tíwènzhě zǒng yào fùchū tā gāi fù de dàijià . " yúshì hè bó ěr
pairs.english: The asker pays what he has to pay."Then Herbor
pairs.hanzi: 提问者总要付出他该付的代价。”于是赫博尔

pairs.target: bǎ àodé lún de shǒu àn zài zìjǐ yǎnjīng shàng , yǐshì
pairs.english: set Odren's hands against his own eyes in sign
pairs.hanzi: 把奥德伦的手按在自己眼睛上，以示

pairs.target: gǎnjī , yúshì yùyán jìxù jìnxíng .
pairs.english: of gratitude, and so the Foretelling went forward.
pairs.hanzi: 感激，于是预言继续进行。

pairs.target: yùyánzhě men jùjí qǐlái , zǒujìn hēiàn .
pairs.english: The Foretellers gathered and went into the darkness.
pairs.hanzi: 预言者们聚集起来，走进黑暗。

pairs.target: hè bó ěr yě jiārù qízhōng , tíchū le tā de wèntí ,
pairs.english: Herbor went among them and asked his question,
pairs.hanzi: 赫博尔也加入其中，提出了他的问题，

pairs.target: wèntí shì ,
pairs.english: and the question was,
pairs.hanzi: 问题是，

pairs.target: āshén · bèi luósī tí · léi mǔ · yīěr · yī pèi hái néng huóduōjiǔ ?
pairs.english: How long will Ashe Berosty rem ir Ipe live?
pairs.hanzi: 阿什·贝罗斯提·雷姆·伊尔·伊佩还能活多久？

pairs.target: yīnwèi hè bó ěr xiǎng jiècǐ dézhī
pairs.english: For Herbor thought thus to get the count of
pairs.hanzi: 因为赫博尔想借此得知

pairs.target: jùtǐ de tiānshù huò niánshù ,
pairs.english: days or years,
pairs.hanzi: 具体的天数或年数，

pairs.target: yǐcǐ ràng tā suǒ ài zhī rén de xīn āndìng ,
pairs.english: and so set his love's heart at rest with
pairs.hanzi: 以此让他所爱之人的心安定，

pairs.target: yǒu quèqiè de dáàn . ránhòu yùyánzhě men zài hēiàn zhōng yídòng , zuìzhōng
pairs.english: certain knowledge. Then the Foretellers moved in the darkness and at
pairs.hanzi: 有确切的答案。然后预言者们在黑暗中移动，最终

pairs.target: àodé lún tòngkǔ dì dàshēng hǎndào ,
pairs.english: last Odren cried in great pain,
pairs.hanzi: 奥德伦痛苦地大声喊道，

pairs.target: fǎngfú zài lièhuǒ zhōng ránshāo ,
pairs.english: as if he burned in a fire,
pairs.hanzi: 仿佛在烈火中燃烧，

pairs.target: bǐ gài jiānà de hè bó ěr huó dé gèng jiǔ !
pairs.english: Longer than Herbor of Geganner!
pairs.hanzi: 比盖加纳的赫博尔活得更久！

pairs.target: zhè bìng búshì hè bó ěr suǒ qīwàng de dáàn ,
pairs.english: It was not the answer Herbor had hoped,
pairs.hanzi: 这并不是赫博尔所期望的答案，

pairs.target: dàn zhè jiùshì tā dédào de dáàn ,
pairs.english: but it was the answer he got,
pairs.hanzi: 但这就是他得到的答案，

pairs.target: tā huáizhe yìkē nàixīn de xīn huídào le
pairs.english: and having a patient heart he went home to
pairs.hanzi: 他怀着一颗耐心的心回到了

pairs.target: chá lǔ sī , dài zhe zhège dáàn ,
pairs.english: Charuthe with it,
pairs.hanzi: 查鲁斯，带着这个答案，

pairs.target: chuānyuè gé lúndé de fēngxuě .
pairs.english: through the snows of Grende.
pairs.hanzi: 穿越格伦德的风雪。

pairs.target: tā zǒujìn le lǐngdì , jìnrù le bǎolěi ,
pairs.english: He came into the Domain and into the strong-place
pairs.hanzi: 他走进了领地，进入了堡垒，

pairs.target: pá shàng le gāotǎ ,
pairs.english: and climbed the tower,
pairs.hanzi: 爬上了高塔，

pairs.target: zài nàlǐ , tā fāxiàn tā de kè mò bànlǚ bèi luósīdì xiàng wǎngcháng yíyàng zuò zhe ,
pairs.english: and there found his kemmering Berosty sitting as ever

pairs.hanzi: 他，动作缓慢得仿佛脖子的铰链已经生锈，

pairs.hanzi: 贝罗斯蒂呆立片刻，神志错乱。

pairs.english: Then he raised up the stone,
pairs.hanzi: 然后他又把石桌抬起来，

pairs.english: and saw that it had crushed Herbor's skull.
pairs.hanzi: 看到它已经砸碎了赫博尔的头骨。

pairs.target: tā bǎ shí zhuō fàng huí le dǐzuò shàng .
pairs.english: He set the stone back on its pedestal.
pairs.hanzi: 他把石桌放回了底座上。

pairs.hanzi: 他躺在死者身旁，

pairs.hanzi: 一切安好。查鲁斯的人们就是这样发现他们的，

pairs.target: cǐhòu bèi luósīdì fēng le , zhǐnéng bèi guān qǐlái ,
pairs.english: Berosty was mad thereafter and had to be kept
pairs.hanzi: 此后贝罗斯蒂疯了，只能被关起来，

pairs.english: under lock, for he would always go looking for Herbor,
pairs.hanzi: 上锁，因为他总是去寻找赫博尔，

pairs.english: He lived a month thus,
pairs.hanzi: 他就这样又活了一个月，

pairs.english: and then hanged himself,
pairs.hanzi: 然后上吊自尽了，

pairs.target: zài àodé sī léi sī , yě jiùshì sè ēn yuè de dìshíjiǔ tiān .
pairs.english: on Odstreth, the nineteenth day of the month of Thern.
pairs.hanzi: 在奥德斯雷斯，也就是瑟恩月的第十九天。

meta.synopsis: A Gethenian folktale recounts Lord Berosty's desperate quest to learn the day of his death from the Foretellers, leading to tragedy for both himself and his beloved Herbor. The story explores fate, love, and the unintended consequences of seeking forbidden knowledge.
